summary: Tested Product Box APIs and Admin UI for product database with HUFT imports and breed-specific products. All 16 backend tests pass. Admin UI verified - login works, Product Box loads correctly with 2503 total products, all filters (search, pillar, breed) work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: HUFT products correctly imported (20 products found via API)
Breed-specific products with correct breed_metadata structure exist (Labrador Pawfect Bandana verified)
Product stats API returns correct counts (2503 total, 2501 active)
Pillar filtering works correctly (shop: 2326 products, celebrate: 611 products)
Breed filtering returns expected results (Labrador: 1051, Shih Tzu: 1033, Indie: 1076)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Admin login, Product Box, search, filters all working)

seed_data_creation: HUFT products (20) and breed-specific personalized products (160) already imported by main agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product database fully populated with 2503 products including 20 HUFT imports and 160 breed-specific products. Admin Product Box UI working with all filters (search, pillar, breed). All APIs verified.

backend_apis.product_box_products: PASS - Returns products with correct total (2503)
backend_apis.product_box_stats: PASS - Returns correct counts by status, pillar, and mira visibility
backend_apis.breed_specific_products: PASS - Found Labrador Pawfect Bandana with correct breed_metadata

admin_ui.product_box_loads: PASS - Unified Product Box component loads with stats cards
admin_ui.products_table: PASS - Products table shows 20 rows per page
admin_ui.pillar_filter: PASS - Celebrate pillar filter applies correctly
admin_ui.breed_filter: PASS - Labrador breed filter applies correctly
